question: Spraying password attack
canonical_answer: an attack that attempts to access a large number of accounts (usernames) with a few commonly used passwords.

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
appears_in.answer: an attack that attempts to access a large number of accounts (usernames) with a few commonly used passwords.

appears_in.title: Comptia Sec Plus Objectives
appears_in.answer: Try a few passwords and move on before account lockout

appears_in.title: Comptia Sec+ 601 Exam Objectives
appears_in.answer: an attempt to guess a password by attempting every possible combination of characters and numbers in it
